headline: Broadridge Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: BR posts Q3 earnings and revenue beat, driven by solid recurring revenue growth. The company raises its full-year EPS outlook.

headline: Trane Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Bookings, Backlog
summary: TT tops Q1 estimates as bookings jumped 24% and backlog hit a record $10.7B, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.

raw.headline: Trane Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Bookings, Backlog
raw.summary: TT tops Q1 estimates as bookings jumped 24% and backlog hit a record $10.7B, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.

headline: Equifax Ataeva Launch Targets Lender Analytics As Shares Trade Below Value
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) has partnered with Ataeva to launch the Ataeva Product Suite, using Equifax credit data to support portfolio optimization tools for lenders. The new suite introduces proprietary analytics designed to help financial institutions refine credit decisioning and customer targeting. The announcement comes as lenders continue to look for more granular metrics and data driven approaches to managing risk and growth. Equifax, trading at $172.56, comes into this partnership after a...

headline: Equifax Inc (NYSE:EFX) Shines in Quality Investing Screen with Strong Growth and Profitability
summary: Equifax (EFX) passes the "Caviar Cruise" quality screen with strong revenue/EBIT growth, a 78% ROIC, and solid cash conversion, trading at a fair forward P/E of 16.52.
